overall.description: First-person night hiking footage through a narrow rocky canyon or ravine. The camera moves steadily forward along a dirt path flanked by rock walls, illuminated by a headlamp or flashlight. The scene is very dark with minimal ambient light, creating an enclosed and isolated atmosphere.

events.description: entering the narrow canyon passage with rock walls closing in on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the uneven dirt path, navigating between close rock walls in darkness

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face forming the left boundary of the canyon
rocky wall with rough texture forming the right boundary
narrow unpaved path with loose rocks and dirt
vertical wooden marker or fence post on the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person perspective walking into a narrow rocky canyon at night. The path is a dirt trail flanked by close rock walls on both sides, illuminated by a headlamp. A wooden post appears briefly on the left as the hiker progresses deeper into the enclosed passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding canyon passage with sky visible overhead

events.description: gap in canyon roof reveals night sky, slightly increasing ambient visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding canyon trail, navigating gentle curves between the rock walls

entered.detail: patch of night sky visible through the gap in the canyon ceiling

segments.scene_description: The hiker continues through the canyon where the walls slightly recede, revealing patches of night sky overhead. The trail remains narrow and rocky, with sparse vegetation visible on the sides. The lighting remains very low, with the headlamp illuminating the path ahead.

events.description: fallen log appears on the left side of the trail as a new obstacle

agents.ego_description: approaching the end section of the canyon, navigating past a fallen log on the left

entered.detail: horizontal wooden log or beam lying across the left side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the trail continuing through the canyon with a prominent fallen log appearing on the left side. The rock walls remain close on both sides, and the path appears to lead toward a slightly more open area or exit ahead. The hiker maintains steady forward progress through the dark enclosed space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a narrow rocky canyon at night that maintains a sense of claustrophobic isolation. It begins with the camera moving deep into an enclosed passage where a headlamp illuminates a dirt trail flanked by towering rock walls and a solitary wooden post. As the hiker progresses, the walls slightly recede to reveal glimpses of the dark night sky overhead and sparse vegetation clinging to the rocky sides. The scene then shifts back toward a more confined space where a prominent fallen log appears on the left, before the path finally leads toward a slightly more open area ahead.
